prose:
The frontier orbitals of aniline were calculated using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-tzvp basis set (tier 'standard'). The calculation was run in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The SCF calculation converged in 9 cycles.

The results are:
HOMO energy: -5.553772 eV
LUMO energy: -0.2489544 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV
